fields.label: Channel Webhook URL
fields.helpText: From the target Discord channel: Edit Channel -> Integrations -> Webhooks -> New Webhook -> Copy Webhook URL.

metadata.summary: One-way outbound Discord notifications via channel webhook URL. Posts only to the channel that owns the webhook; cannot read messages or list channels.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. In Discord, open the channel that should receive notifications.
2. Click the gear next to the channel name -> Integrations -> Webhooks.
3. Click 'New Webhook', set a name and avatar, then 'Copy Webhook URL'.
4. Paste the URL here.
